root_text.an6.90:1.3: Sakkāyadiṭṭhi, vicikicchā, sīlabbataparāmāso, apāyagamanīyo rāgo, apāyagamanīyo doso, apāyagamanīyo moho.
root_text.an6.90:1.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, cha dhammā diṭṭhisampannassa puggalassa pahīnā”ti.

translation_text.an6.90:1.1: “Mendicants, an individual accomplished in view has given up these six things.
translation_text.an6.90:1.3: Substantialist view, doubt, misapprehension of precepts and observances, and forms of greed, hate, and delusion that lead to rebirth in places of loss.
translation_text.an6.90:1.4: An individual accomplished in view has given up these six things.”
